proposed_bullet_text: [W6 CHARUCOSKIP 2026-07-08, Codex PASS] Cross-lane courtesy repair for CALV1 ChArUco test: tests/racketsport/test_calibrate_charuco_device.py now keeps the house pytest.importorskip("cv2.aruco") pattern and additionally skips before synthetic video generation/subprocess when cv2.aruco.detectMarkers is missing, with reason cv2.aruco (opencv-contrib) not available. On this Mac .venv the focused file is green as 1 skipped; scaffold/dead-code/storage guardrails pass. Note to CALV1 session: CLI/calibration semantics are unchanged when opencv-contrib is installed; this only prevents non-contrib OpenCV envs from leaving main red.
